{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Lindon's white madra
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] can extend fingers of white madra from his right hand.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c24">''Wintersteel'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
